action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the operational state of the rail sector, including specific IDs for trains and track switches. Essential for identifying UP-7400, UP-8800, and the switches at MP 44.5 and MP 47.0.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_warrants
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all currently active track warrants (authorities) in the sector to manage overlaps and track specific warrant IDs for voiding.

action_set_definitions.name: get_train_status
action_set_definitions.description: Provides the high-precision current milepost (MP) and speed of a train. Used to verify arrival/clearance and to estimate travel times for efficient polling.

train_id.description: The unique ID of the train to track.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_track_warrant
action_set_definitions.description: Issues a movement authority to a train between two mileposts with operational instructions.

action_set_definitions.name: void_track_warrant
action_set_definitions.description: Voids an existing track warrant, removing the train's authority over the specified track segment.

warrant_id.description: The ID of the warrant to be voided.

action_set_definitions.name: control_switch
action_set_definitions.description: Operates a track switch to either the Normal (Main) or Reverse (Siding) position.

switch_id.description: The ID of the switch asset.

state_description.current_time: The current simulation time in seconds from the start of the shift.
state_description.trains: List of all active trains in the controlled sector.
state_description.track_segments: Status of all physical track sections and junctions.
state_description.active_conflicts: Current safety or scheduling conflicts detected.
